title: Samueli School's Engineering+ Society Institute to Focus on AI
snippet: Strategic partners include UCI School of Social Sciences Dean Bill Maurer, Beall Center for Art & Technology Director Jesse Colin Jackson, Beall Applied Innovation's Errol Arkilic (chief executive) and Stuart Matthews (AI strategist)...
match_reason: websearch (other) — Arkilic named as a strategic partner (chief executive) for UCI's new Engineering+ Society Institute focused on AI, not just mentioned in passing

title: UCR and Corona naval center create educational partnership
snippet: UC Riverside and the U.S. Naval Surface Warfare Center Corona Division have begun a new era of collaboration on high tech research, entering into an education partnership agreement. Chancellor S. Jack Hu and Capt. Joseph Burgon formally signed the agreement. Disciplines include data science, artificial intelligence, engineering, and metrology.
match_reason: websearch (other) — Chancellor Hu is named as the signatory of the partnership; the agreement explicitly covers artificial intelligence as a research discipline.

title: The AI Revolution in Medicine, Revisited: The reality of generative AI in the clinic
snippet: Microsoft Research podcast episode featuring Sara Murray, vice president and chief health AI officer at UC San Francisco Health, discussing the reality of generative AI in the clinic alongside co-hosts and other guests.
match_reason: websearch (podcast) — Sara Murray is explicitly named as a guest; she is identified as VP and Chief Health AI Officer at UCSF Health, discussing generative AI in clinical medicine.
